title: Duplicate records inserted into database
symptom: The workflow sometimes creates duplicate records in the database despite using ON CONFLICT to handle duplicates.
applies_when: Inserting records into a Postgres database
Using ON CONFLICT clause in SQL
not_this_if: user_id is set as UNIQUE in the database
root_cause: If the user_id is not set as UNIQUE in the database schema, the ON CONFLICT clause will not prevent duplicates from being inserted, leading to multiple records for the same user_id.
fix_steps: Check the database schema to ensure user_id is defined as UNIQUE
If not, alter the table to set user_id as UNIQUE.
agent_instruction: Verify that user_id is set as UNIQUE in your Postgres database schema.
